name: Plain

evidence.claim: Plain is an API-first customer infrastructure platform for B2B SaaS with a GraphQL API that provides full feature parity with its UI.
Plain provides an official typed TypeScript SDK and an API explorer for developers.
Search citation: Why API-First Infrastructure wins in an Agent-driven world
Search citation: Plain Product — AI Support Infrastructure for B2B Teams

mcp_notes: Plain explicitly states they have native MCP server support.
api_notes: The API is GraphQL-based with full feature parity with the UI, allowing programmatic control over essentially all product functions.
access_notes: Developers can access the API by creating a Plain workspace, which allows them to generate API keys in the settings.
auth_notes: Authentication is performed via API keys associated with 'Machine Users', provided in the Authorization header as a Bearer token.
one_liner: Plain is an API-first customer support infrastructure platform designed for B2B teams to build custom workflows and integrate customer data.
